channel.title: Remote-Work on Kelly and Coffee
channel.description: Recent content in Remote-Work on Kelly and Coffee

item.title: A Day in the Life of a Remote Worker
item.description: Recently, I was asked what my day looks like during this pandemic as it rendered me (like so many others) a full-time remote worker. People assume my days are very relax, laid back and filed with breaks. I honestly hate to burst their bubbles; but I generally have more to do than I would if I were working at the office.
